# Spec Summary (Lite)

Build the weekly reflection and visualization layer for AntarMind AI: a backend aggregation service that computes weekly thought summaries (category distribution, day-by-day sentiment, peak activity, top insights), a `GET /api/reflections/weekly` endpoint, and a React dashboard page with MUI X Charts visualizations — including an opt-in AI-generated natural language summary paragraph when an external LLM API key is configured.
